name: Cup of Love Coffee
tagline: A little coffee cart on West Napa Street with a big heart — fast, friendly, and a hand-stuck heart on every cup.
seoDescription: Cup of Love Coffee is a beloved coffee cart at 195 W Napa St in Sonoma, CA — owner Amy Granum serves quick, thoughtful coffee and goodies with a 4.9-star rating and a heart on every cup.

sections.heading: The little cart that put a heart on Sonoma’s morning
sections.subheading: Cup of Love is the coffee cart on the corner of West Napa and Second — where Amy pours fast, thoughtful drinks, sends you off with a heart-shaped sticker on the cup, and keeps one of the last truly social corners in town.
badges: Corner of W Napa & 2nd St W

sections.heading: Bought with love, run the same way
body: Amy Granum used to stare at the little coffee cart across from the Black Bear Diner where she worked. “When it came up for sale, I came right over and bought it.” That’s Cup of Love — a Sonoma corner she made her own, working alongside Andy.

Every order goes out with a small heart-shaped sticker on the cup — a nod to her family’s motto. Regulars don’t just come for the coffee; they come for the rare thing it’s become: a genuinely social spot where the person making your drink knows your name.
highlights: A hand-stuck heart on every cup
One of the last truly social corners in town

items.title: Espresso & Drip
items.description: Quick, thoughtful coffee — lattes, espresso, and a proper cup of drip to start the day.

items.title: Specialty Drinks
items.description: The seasonal and signature drinks Amy makes with care, not in a hurry.

items.title: Fresh Goodies
items.description: Baked goods and treats to go with your cup.

items.title: Grab-and-Go
items.description: In and out fast on the way to work — without losing the friendly part.

items.title: Order Ahead
items.description: Order on the way so it’s ready when you reach the corner.

items.title: A Heart on Every Cup
items.description: The little heart-shaped sticker that signs off every order.

items.title: Fast and thoughtful
items.body: Quick, efficient, and still careful with every drink.

items.title: A real social corner
items.body: One of the last places around with genuine morning conversation.

items.title: Right on West Napa
items.body: On the corner of West Napa Street and Second Street West.

sections.heading: Come find the heart on the corner
sections.body: Cup of Love Coffee is at 195 W Napa St, Sonoma, open early Mon–Sat. Call (707) 260-9741 to order ahead.

sections.heading: A great cup, signed with a heart

Open Monday–Saturday from 6am to noon, and Sunday 7am to noon.
Yes — call ahead at (707) 260-9741 and we’ll have it ready.

items.q: What’s with the heart on the cup?
items.a: It’s a nod to Amy’s family motto — a little heart sticker on every order.
